# Version 3.119.0
> **Skia m119 and broader Linux** · Released April 25, 2025 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.0)

> **Supersedes [3.118.0](3.118.0.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.1.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.0 bumps to Skia milestone 119 and dramatically widens the Linux and Windows platform matrix. This release adds LoongArch64, RISC-V 64, Alpine and Windows ARM builds, brings Direct3D on Windows, expands Metal to tvOS, and refreshes libpng and vulkanmemoryallocator. It also lands several long-standing SKCanvas, SKColorFilter and .NET Framework fixes.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Engine

- **Skia milestone 119** — Bumps the bundled Skia to milestone 119, picking up the upstream renderer and text improvements. ([#3062](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3062))

## API Surface

- **SaveLayerRec on SKCanvas** — Implements SkCanvas::SaveLayerRec so consumers can save layers with a backdrop filter, image filter and flags in one call. — ❤️ [@ahmed605](https://github.com/ahmed605) ([#2962](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2962))
- **Missing SKColorFilter types** — Adds the SKColorFilter types that had been missing from the managed surface. ([#2882](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2882))
- **Metal render targets everywhere** — The GRBackendRenderTarget Metal APIs are now available on every Apple platform. — ❤️ [@spouliot](https://github.com/spouliot) ([#3070](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3070))
- **tvOS Metal view** — Adds SKMetalView support on tvOS. — ❤️ [@MartinZikmund](https://github.com/MartinZikmund) ([#3114](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3114))

## Bug Fixes

- **SKImage.FromPicture** — Corrects the SKImage.FromPicture implementation so pictures render as expected. ([#3231](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3231))
- **.NET Framework + packages.config** — Fixes a regression that broke projects using .NET Framework or Mono with packages.config. — ❤️ [@sungaila](https://github.com/sungaila) ([#3112](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3112))
- **iOS Simulator Metal performance** — Restores acceptable frame times when rendering with Metal in the iOS Simulator. — ❤️ [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#3156](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3156))
- **Blazor and WASM plumbing** — Fixes .NET 9 ASP.NET Blazor issues and moves the earlier WASM workaround into SkiaSharp itself so consumers don't have to. ([#3064](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3064), [#3088](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3088), [#3082](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3082), [#3092](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3092))

## Platform

- **New Linux architectures** — Adds LoongArch64 and RISC-V 64 native builds, extends the cross-compiler to Alpine, and generally widens Linux support. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry), [@kasperk81](https://github.com/kasperk81) ([#3198](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3198), [#3192](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3192), [#3200](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3200), [#3209](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3209))
- **Windows ARM and Direct3D** — Enables GL on Windows ARM, fixes ARM build targets, and compiles Skia with Direct3D on Windows. — ❤️ [@Kation](https://github.com/Kation) ([#3189](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3189), [#3190](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3190), [#2823](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2823))
- **Skia milestone 118 catch-up** — Also rolls in the never-released 3.118.0 preview line — the milestone 117 and 118 bumps, the fontconfig update, WinUI SDK version pinning, and the Blazor/WASM base-path fix. ([#3048](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3048), [#3047](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3047), [#3221](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3221), [#3085](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3085), [#3092](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3092))

## Security

- **CVE-2024-30105** — Addresses CVE-2024-30105 in the build. — ❤️ [@pjcollins](https://github.com/pjcollins) ([#3166](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3166))
- **Native dependency refresh** — Updates libpng, vulkanmemoryallocator, freetype2, libexpat, libjpeg-turbo and HarfBuzz. — ❤️ [@kasperk81](https://github.com/kasperk81) ([#3059](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3059), [#3196](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3196), [#3061](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3061), [#3056](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3056), [#3060](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3060), [#3052](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3052))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.1

Refreshes HarfBuzz to 8.3.1.1 and picks up the LoongArch64, RISC-V 64, Alpine and Windows ARM native builds for the HarfBuzzSharp binding. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry), [@kasperk81](https://github.com/kasperk81) ([#3198](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3198), [#3192](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3192), [#3194](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3194), [#3190](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3190), [#3100](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3100), [#3096](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3096), [#3088](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3088), [#3082](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3082))

## Preview 1 (March 31, 2025)

Preview 1 opened the 3.119.0 line, widening the Linux and Windows platform matrix, adding SaveLayerRec, and rolling in the milestone 117/118 catch-up work.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.118.0-preview.2.3...v3.119.0-preview.1.2)

## Preview 2 (December 5, 2024)

Preview 2 collected the Blazor/WASM fixes, the Metal APIs everywhere, and the freetype/libexpat/libjpeg-turbo refreshes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.118.0-preview.1.2...v3.118.0-preview.2.3)

Preview 1 opened the 3.119.0 line, widening the Linux and Windows platform matrix, adding SaveLayerRec, and rolling in the milestone 117/118 catch-up work.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.116.1...v3.118.0-preview.1.2)
